assertions.assertion: Uses AddPostgreSqlStore() with a connection string inside AddUserManagement options
assertions.rationale: Uses Npgsql EF Core provider with AddDbContext, not AddPostgreSqlStore().

assertions.assertion: Explains that no EF Core migrations are needed (document-based storage)
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states EF Core migrations ARE required.

assertions.assertion: Shows IDatabaseSchema.CreateIfNotExistsAsync() for automatic schema creation
